channel.title: Matchday — Today's Matches
channel.description: Daily fixtures for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Times in UTC.

item.title: ⚽ Matches — Sun 21 Jun 2026
item.description:
04:00 UTC — Tunisia vs Japan · Group F · Estadio BBVA, Monterrey (Guadalupe)
16:00 UTC — Spain vs Saudi Arabia · Group H · Mercedes-Benz Stadium, Atlanta
19:00 UTC — Belgium vs Iran · Group G · SoFi Stadium, Los Angeles (Inglewood)
22:00 UTC — Uruguay vs Cape Verde · Group H · Hard Rock Stadium, Miami (Miami Gardens, FL)
01:00 UTC — New Zealand vs Egypt · Group G · BC Place, Vancouver

item.title: ⚽ Matches — Sat 20 Jun 2026
item.description:

17:00 UTC — Netherlands vs Sweden · Group F · NRG Stadium, Houston
20:00 UTC — Germany vs Ivory Coast · Group E · BMO Field, Toronto
00:00 UTC — Ecuador vs Curaçao · Group E · GEHA Field at Arrowhead Stadium, Kansas City

item.title: ⚽ Matches — Fri 19 Jun 2026
item.description:
